Name.description: Friendly application name to match in the registry.

Ensure.description: Whether the application should be present or absent.

InstallerPath.description: Local path, UNC path, or URL to the installer file (.msi or .exe).

InstallerArguments.description: Silent installation arguments to pass to the installer.

ProductCode.description: The MSI product code GUID (including braces) of the application.

DisplayNameRegex.description: Regular expression used to match the application's DisplayName.

MinimumVersion.description: The minimum version required. If the installed version is lower, the installer will run.

InstallTimeoutSeconds.description: The timeout in seconds to wait for the installer to exit.

DetectionMethod.description: The method used to detect whether the application is installed.

CustomDetectionScript.description: A PowerShell script block text returning true or false.

LogPath.description: Optional log file path for installation tracking.

RebootBehavior.description: Reboot behavior if the installer returns exit code 3010.

AllowNonMsiUninstall.description: Allow running non-MSI uninstallation strings when Ensure is Absent.

Installed.description: Whether the application is currently installed on the system.

DisplayName.description: The actual DisplayName of the application found in the registry.

DisplayVersion.description: The actual DisplayVersion of the application found in the registry.

Publisher.description: The actual Publisher of the application found in the registry.

InstallLocation.description: The actual InstallLocation of the application found in the registry.

UninstallString.description: The actual UninstallString of the application found in the registry.

RegistryKeyPath.description: The actual RegistryKeyPath of the application found in the registry.

DetectedArchitecture.description: The actual Architecture of the application found in the registry.
